# chronosphere_email_alert_notifier (Resource)

Email notifier that delivers monitor signals to a recipient address with templated HTML and/or plain-text bodies. Referenced from notification policies.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Display name of the notifier.
- `to` (String) Email address to send notifications to.

### Optional

- `html` (String) Body of the email in HTML format. Supports Go templating.
- `send_resolved` (Boolean) Whether to send a follow-up notification when an alert is resolved. Defaults to true.
- `slug` (String) Stable identifier for the notifier. Generated from `name` if omitted. Immutable after creation.
- `text` (String) Body of the email in plain text format. Supports Go templating.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
